reasoning: The market probability for the global temperature anomaly to be less than 1.10ºC in October 2025 was 0.01 on October 16. As of October 26, the month is almost complete, so meteorological reanalyses (like ERA5) already provide an extremely accurate preview of the final GISS value. Recent years have seen GISS anomalies consistently push above 1.20ºC–1.30ºC for many months. The 1% market indication overwhelmingly confirms that October 2025 is tracking well above the 1.10ºC threshold. Constrained by the allowed bounds of [0.02, 0.98], I am setting my final probability at the minimum allowed value of 0.02.
